overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through a rainy neon-lit Night City street to the 'El Coyote Cojo' bar, entering the establishment, exploring the dimly lit interior with red and green neon lighting, and approaching the bartender. The scene features cyberpunk aesthetics with heavy rain, reflective wet streets, and atmospheric neon signage.

events.description: blue van drives past from left to right on the wet street
red sports car passes by the bar entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk toward the El Coyote Cojo bar entrance, passing through light rain

notable_agents.action: blue van driving past on the rain-slicked street
red sports car with glowing taillights driving past the bar

entered.detail: large illuminated orange neon sign reading 'EL COYOTE COJO' mounted on the building facade
dark building front with purple neon strip lighting at ground level and graffiti decorations
rain-slicked asphalt reflecting the colorful neon lights from the bar and street
elevated roadway or monorail track structure visible in the distance against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rainy Night City street at night, with the camera walking toward the 'El Coyote Cojo' bar. The large orange neon sign dominates the view while vehicles including a blue van and red sports car pass by on the wet asphalt. The street reflects the vibrant neon colors, creating a classic cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar entrance with decorative bull skull and sticker-covered doors

events.description: passing through the double doors from the rainy street into the bar interior
transitioning from bright outdoor neon to dim blue interior lighting of the entrance corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance doors and stepping inside the bar, moving from the rain into the sheltered interior

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking past the entrance on the sidewalk, moving away from the bar

entered.detail: dark metal double doors with small windows, covered in stickers and graffiti
large white bull skull with long horns mounted above the entrance doorway
narrow corridor with ceiling fan and blue ambient lighting leading into the main bar area

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the bar entrance, passing the decorative bull skull mounted above the doors. After a pedestrian walks past, the camera enters through the double doors, transitioning from the rainy neon-lit street into a dimly lit entrance corridor with a ceiling fan, marking the shift from outdoor to indoor space.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit cyberpunk bar interior with red and green neon lighting and scattered tables

events.description: moving from the narrow entrance corridor into the main open bar area with seating
turning right to examine the wall covered in newspaper clippings and posters

agents.ego_description: walking through the bar interior, observing the decor, neon lighting, and other patrons seated at tables

notable_agents.action: patron sitting alone at a round table near the left wall, drinking
patron sitting at a table near the back wall, facing the bar

entered.detail: long bar counter with green neon underlighting and shelves of bottles in the background
rotating ceiling fans with integrated lighting hanging from the ceiling
circular metal tables with stools scattered throughout the bar floor
wall completely covered with layered newspaper clippings, posters, and graffiti
tall illuminated purple vending machine near the entrance corridor

segments.scene_description: Inside the bar, the camera explores the main seating area illuminated by red and green neon lights. The space features round tables with patrons sitting quietly, ceiling fans rotating overhead, and a long bar counter visible in the background. The camera turns to examine a distinctive wall covered entirely in newspaper clippings before continuing to explore the atmospheric interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar counter area with green neon signage and bartender

events.description: dialogue options appear on screen indicating available interaction with the bartender
slowing to a stop at the bar counter in front of the bartender

agents.ego_description: approaching the bartender at the counter and stopping to initiate conversation

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the counter, cleaning a glass and waiting to serve

entered.detail: round cushioned stools lined up along the front of the bar counter
green neon signs above the bar including 'EL COYOTE COJO' and other decorative lighting
shelves filled with various bottles of alcohol behind the bartender
red neon sign indicating age restriction on the left side of the bar

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the bar counter where a bartender stands ready behind shelves of liquor bottles illuminated by green neon lighting. Dialogue options appear on screen as the player stops at the counter, indicating an interaction is available. The surrounding area features bar stools and neon signage including an '18+' age restriction sign.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked cyberpunk street into the moody, neon-lit interior of the El Coyote Cojo bar. It begins by moving through the night air toward a glowing orange neon sign, passing reflective wet asphalt and streaming traffic. As the camera reaches the entrance, it passes beneath a decorative bull skull and crosses the threshold, transitioning from the rainy outdoor atmosphere into a dimly lit corridor with rotating ceiling fans. The scene then expands into the main lounge, where the lighting shifts to deep reds and greens across quiet patrons and a wall plastered in newspaper clippings. Finally, the camera glides toward the bar counter, coming to a stop before the bartender and shelves of illuminated liquor bottles as interaction options appear on screen.
